response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: No vocal music was found, matching the JSON summary. Manual transcription of VTuber Ninomae Ina'nis' gameplay commentary was performed.
2. JSON Usage: The JSON reference was fully utilized for context (Ina playing Minecraft, discussing farm slabs). Spoken audio was transcribed and translated manually.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously matched to Ina's speech bursts, keeping subtitles highly synchronized and natural. Pronunciation quirks like 'Iわかる' (I wakaru) are preserved in the original transcription.

subtitles.original: Slabs are more efficient?
subtitles.english: Slabs are more efficient?

subtitles.original: I guess slabs could work too, huh?
subtitles.english: I guess slabs could work too, huh?

subtitles.original: Is it 55?
subtitles.english: Is it 55?

subtitles.original: I thought buying back is 55?
subtitles.english: I thought buying back is 55?

subtitles.original: So slabs are better is what you guys are saying.
subtitles.english: So slabs are better is what you guys are saying.

subtitles.original: Okay, I will trust you. I will trust you...
subtitles.english: Okay, I will trust you. I will trust you...

subtitles.original: ...unless it's kind of annoying to put.
subtitles.english: ...unless it's kind of annoying to put.

subtitles.original: Like this, right?
subtitles.english: Like this, right?

subtitles.original: Or do I put one below? Yes? No? Half a block lower?
subtitles.english: Or do I put one below? Yes? No? Half a block lower?

subtitles.original: Ah, okay, okay, okay.
subtitles.english: Ah, okay, okay, okay.

subtitles.original: Iわかる。
subtitles.english: I understand.

subtitles.original: It's... it can work both ways, but I think this way is better.
subtitles.english: It's... it can work both ways, but I think this way is better.

subtitles.original: Okay, a little bit of time lost, but I think it's a good investment of time.
subtitles.english: Okay, a little bit of time lost, but I think it's a good investment of time.

subtitles.original: Oh, wait.
subtitles.english: Oh, wait.

subtitles.original: I have to be careful I don't block off the entire water.
subtitles.english: I have to be careful I don't block off the entire water.

subtitles.original: Especially that one row with the open water.
subtitles.english: Especially that one row with the open water.

subtitles.original: The melon won't grow on the slabs, right? 'Cause it's a... it's a slab.
subtitles.english: The melon won't grow on the slabs, right? 'Cause it's a... it's a slab.

subtitles.original: If it does, then I'll just have to bonk you guys, that's all.
subtitles.english: If it does, then I'll just have to bonk you guys, that's all.

subtitles.original: See, I'm getting split answers now.
subtitles.english: See, I'm getting split answers now.

subtitles.original: I guess we'll see once I harvest.
subtitles.english: I guess we'll see once I harvest.

subtitles.original: Oh, ground and grass. Okay, okay.
subtitles.english: Oh, ground and grass. Okay, okay.

subtitles.original: Man, this is why sometimes I don't want to ask chat, 'cause it just messes up my brain.
subtitles.english: Man, this is why sometimes I don't want to ask chat, 'cause it just messes up my brain.

subtitles.original: My brain is already going at like 300 miles per hour, and then I ask, and then I get like 50 different answers.
subtitles.english: My brain is already going at like 300 miles per hour, and then I ask, and then I get like 50 different answers.

subtitles.original: I'm just like, "Well, now I'm overthinking again..."
subtitles.english: I'm just like, "Well, now I'm overthinking again..."

subtitles.original: ...and doubting myself when I shouldn't be.
subtitles.english: ...and doubting myself when I shouldn't be.

subtitles.original: So, I do believe in myself. But, like, no matter how many times I say there's no need to backseat what I'm doing...
subtitles.english: So, I do believe in myself. But, like, no matter how many times I say there's no need to backseat what I'm doing...

subtitles.original: ...people don't listen, so...
subtitles.english: ...people don't listen, so...

subtitles.original: Okay, one last... Good, we're good, we're good.
subtitles.english: Okay, one last... Good, we're good, we're good.

subtitles.original: Okay, okay, okay, okay, okay. Good.
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, okay, okay, okay. Good.

subtitles.original: I would get more mods, but I have trust issues.
subtitles.english: I would get more mods, but I have trust issues.
